message:
fix: Remove CLAUDE.md from repo (keep in .claude/), add EB_ env var prefix support

- Removed root CLAUDE.md (now gitignored in .claude/ folder)
- Added EB_ prefix env var mapping: EB_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -> ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
- Added EB_CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR -> CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR mapping
- Updated .claude/CLAUDE.md with env var documentation
